hero.label: — Intelligent residential management
hero.headline: The ERP that simplifies the management of residential communities, condominiums, and buildings
hero.subtitle: FRACTAE is an integrated system that centralizes communication, access, finances, reports, and incidents in one single platform. Leave Excel, WhatsApp, and paper behind.

why.label: Why FRACTAE?
why.title: Managing a community should not depend on scattered messages, lost files, and manual reports.

problems.title: Manual and scattered processes
problems.desc: WhatsApp, Excel, paper, and phone calls create duplicate information, errors, and lack of follow-up.

problems.title: Hard-to-control collections
problems.desc: Late payments, manual reconciliations, and limited financial visibility.

problems.title: Disorganized communication
problems.desc: Lost announcements, repeated complaints, and residents without clear information.

problems.title: Reactive operation
problems.desc: The administrator finds out late, responds late, and documents very little.

problems.title: Access without full traceability
problems.desc: Visitors, providers, and residents enter without a reliable operational record.

solutions.title: Everything centralized in one system
solutions.desc: Access, payments, communication, reports, and incidents from a single platform.

solutions.title: Real-time financial control
solutions.desc: Check collections, outstanding balances, payments, and reports without relying on manual files.

solutions.title: Clear and segmented communication
solutions.desc: Send announcements to residents, committees, or specific groups without operational noise.

solutions.title: Management based on data, not assumptions
solutions.desc: Dashboards and reports to make decisions with updated information.

solutions.title: Secure and traceable access
solutions.desc: Complete record of entries and exits, visitors, providers, and authorizations.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need in one system
features.subtitle: Designed for administrators who need real control.

items.texto: Control access for residents, visitors, providers, and authorized personnel with clear, traceable, and searchable records.
bullets: Entry and exit history with identification
Records by resident, visitor, or provider

items.texto: Check payments, balances, and collection progress without depending on spreadsheets or endless reconciliations.
bullets: Financial reports for administration and committee

items.descripcion: A formal channel for the entire community
items.texto: Prevent important announcements from getting lost in chats. Centralize communications, documents, and relevant messages.
bullets: Communication between administration, committee, and residents

items.texto: Turn complaints, reports, and incidents into tickets with an owner, status, evidence, and resolution date.
bullets: History by house, area, or category

items.texto: Manage bookings for event rooms, courts, terraces, or common areas with clear rules and visible availability.
bullets: Rules by amenity or resident type

items.texto: Consult residents, measure positions, and run binding votes under pre-defined rules, with clear results and searchable evidence.
bullets: Documentary support for committee or assembly decisions

items.descripcion: Automate repetitive tasks and stop depending on scattered files.
Check reports, payments, incidents, and operational activity from one place.
Centralize announcements, account statements, documents, and requests.
Measure collections, incidents, access, and operations with clear reports.
Every request, payment, or access record is stored with a searchable history.
Ideal for small, medium, or large communities with multiple operational needs.

plans.label: Plans
plans.title: Modernize your community management with FRACTAE
plans.subtitle: Flexible plans based on the size of your community
plans.description: Request a personalized demo and discover how FRACTAE adapts perfectly to your community's needs.

items.q: Is FRACTAE for residential communities or also for condominiums?
items.a: FRACTAE is designed for residential communities such as gated communities, horizontal condominiums, residential towers, private communities, and developments with centralized administration.

items.q: Do I need to install new hardware to use FRACTAE?
items.a: Not necessarily. FRACTAE can start with administrative and digital modules. Access, security, or hardware integrations can be evaluated based on each community's infrastructure or needs.

items.q: What modules does the platform include?
items.a: FRACTAE can include access, finances, communication, consultations and voting, reports, incidents, amenity reservations, security, and administrative dashboards.

items.q: Do residents also use the platform?
items.a: Yes. FRACTAE includes an iOS and Android app so residents can check information, receive announcements, submit requests, review payments, or generate access passes, depending on the contracted modules.
It depends on the size of the community and the selected modules. During the demo, we can estimate an implementation roadmap by stages.

items.q: Does FRACTAE replace WhatsApp and Excel?
items.a: It does not force you to eliminate them immediately, but it does reduce dependency on them by centralizing formal processes, operational information, and reports in one platform.

items.q: How do I request a demo?
items.a: Complete the contact form and the FRACTAE team will get back to you to understand your community's needs and show you the platform.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Schedule a demo for your community and we will reply in less than 24 hours.
contact.subtitle: Tell us how your community operates and we will show you how FRACTAE can help centralize access, payments, communication, and reports.
contact.step2_label: How would you prefer to be contacted?
contact.success_subtitle: The FRACTAE team will be in touch soon.

footer.tagline: Complete management for residential communities, condominiums, and buildings.
